languages.text: {n}Капитан, а теперь уже архмилитант, Дунавски не сразу замечает вас. Она с благоговением рассматривает мостик, блуждая взглядом по величественным статуям и альковам управления.{/n}
{n}Captain — now Arch-Militant — Dunawski does not immediately notice you. She is looking around the bridge in awe, wandering among the majestic statues and command alcoves.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Капитан, а теперь уже архмилитант, Дунавски не сразу замечает вас. Она с благоговением рассматривает мостик, блуждая взглядом по величественным статуям и альковам управления.{/n}

{n}Captain — now Arch-Militant — Dunawski does not immediately notice you. She is looking around the bridge in awe, wandering among the majestic statues and command alcoves.{/n}

languages.text: {n}艦長ダナウスキーは、あなたに気づかない。彼女は、橋の周りを畏敬の念を抱いて見ている。壮大な像や指揮席の間をさまよっている。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Captain Dunawski — now your Arch-Militant — does not immediately notice you. She looks around the bridge in awe, wandering among the majestic statues and command alcoves.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Yüzbaşı, daha doğrusu yeni ünvanıyla Başmilitan Dunawski seni hemen fark etmiyor. Görkemli heykeller ve komuta odacıkları arasında dolaşarak köprüyü huşu içinde inceliyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Captain — now Arch-Militant — Dunawski does not immediately notice you. She is looking around the bridge in awe, wandering among the majestic statues and command alcoves.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Yüzbaşı, daha doğrusu yeni ünvanıyla Başmilitan Dunawski seni hemen fark etmiyor. Görkemli heykeller ve komuta odacıkları arasında dolaşarak köprüyü huşu içinde inceliyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}曾经的上尉，你如今的首席战士杜纳芙斯卡，并未立刻察觉到你。她正满怀敬畏地环顾舰桥，在雄伟的雕像与指挥龛之间流连。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Captain — now Arch-Militant — Dunawski does not immediately notice you. She is looking around the bridge in awe, wandering among the majestic statues and command alcoves.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}曾经的上尉，你如今的首席战士杜纳芙斯卡，并未立刻察觉到你。她正满怀敬畏地环顾舰桥，在雄伟的雕像与指挥龛之间流连。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Captain — jetzt Erzmilitantin — Dunawski bemerkt dich nicht sofort. Sie lässt ihren Blick bewundernd über die Brücke schweifen und betrachtet die majestätischen Statuen und Kommandonischen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Captain — now Arch-Militant — Dunawski does not immediately notice you. She is looking around the bridge in awe, wandering among the majestic statues and command alcoves.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Captain — jetzt Erzmilitantin — Dunawski bemerkt dich nicht sofort. Sie lässt ihren Blick bewundernd über die Brücke schweifen und betrachtet die majestätischen Statuen und Kommandonischen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}La capitaine Dunawski, désormais votre archimilitante, ne vous remarque pas immédiatement. Son regard plein d'admiration et d'émerveillement se promène sur la passerelle, oscillant entre les statues majestueuses et les alcôves de commandement.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Captain — now Arch-Militant — Dunawski does not immediately notice you. She is looking around the bridge in awe, wandering among the majestic statues and command alcoves.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La capitaine Dunawski, désormais votre archimilitante, ne vous remarque pas immédiatement. Son regard plein d'admiration et d'émerveillement se promène sur la passerelle, oscillant entre les statues majestueuses et les alcôves de commandement.{/n}

languages.text: {n}La capitana Dunawski, ahora Archimilitante, no se fija en ti. Mira el puente con asombro paseando entre las majestuosas estatuas y las zonas de mando.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Captain — now Arch-Militant — Dunawski does not immediately notice you. She is looking around the bridge in awe, wandering among the majestic statues and command alcoves.{/n}
